title: lippia tegulifera
intro: Lippia tegulifera, also known as Red Honeysuckle, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lippia tegulifera include treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
